AUTORESEARCH-01.desc: experiment-tracker.js: createExperiment() returns valid experiment with id, status=pending

AUTORESEARCH-02.desc: experiment-tracker.js: recordResult() keeps improved experiments, discards regressions

AUTORESEARCH-03.desc: experiment-tracker.js: getProgress() returns valid progress with keepRate

AUTORESEARCH-04.desc: autoresearch-runner.js: scoreSuite() correctly parses node:test output and bounds score in [0,1]

AUTORESEARCH-05.desc: MUTATION_TARGETS all resolve to existing files with matching patterns
